name: Basic Earthsense
desc: All with earthcraft have an innate, intuitive grasp of nearby earth and stone.

abilities.name: Earthsense

name: Basic Flamesense
desc: All with flamecraft can easily sense nearby flames, and objects that call for them.

abilities.name: Flamesense

name: Basic Furnacecraft
desc: Basic manipulation of heat that all flamebound have some aptitude for.

abilities.name: Furnacecraft

name: Basic Flickercraft
desc: By peering into flames you can get vague visions of the future, although you lack the skill to glean true insights from it.

abilities.name: Flickercraft

name: Novice Flickercraft
desc: You have practiced your flickercraft, and can typically get a usable vision from a campfire.

abilities.name: Flickercraft
Flame Reading
abilities.effect: As a _Camp Action_ when you have a campfire you may attempt to peer into what is to come on your next day of travel. Roll a die; on a 4+, the GM places a random _Discovery_, _Menace_, or _Event_ (your choice) in the deck face-up, which treats the card as already revealed when drawn. Along with this, you get a hazy vision of what is to come, the full details of which make sense when confronted with the situation. If you fail the roll, your spirit may gain _Stress_ to instead succeed.

abilities.name: Burning Augury
abilities.effect: You can look into a flame and attempt to chart potential futures, guiding your course of action. You and your spirit may both gain _Stress_ to ask your GM what the outcome of a specific action you take will be. Depending on how far reaching the consequences will be, you may need a campfire (for something as immediate as 'what would happen if I pull this lever') up to a razing inferno, for something that may take a season or more to occur ('what will happen if we plant crops in this field'). If you do not have a sufficient flame for an adequate answer, do not gain _Stress_.

abilities.name: Flickering Futures
abilities.effect: Whenever you start the round in an _Arena_ with a _Source_ 2 (_Flames_) you may choose one enemy; the GM will tell you what _Stance_ they are choosing and the specifics of how it works.

imbues.name: Visions of Flames Past
imbues.effect: You may use this even if there is not a _Source_ present, as you recall visions you saw in previous flames that now make sense.

name: Basic Fuelcraft
desc: The physical aspect of flamecraft, where you use yourself as fuel for greatly increased physical capabilities.

abilities.name: Fuelcraft

name: Basic Wrathcraft
desc: Much like a roaring flame, flamebound can manipulate the rage of a creature, causing it to flare.

abilities.name: Wrathcraft

name: Basic Blazecraft
desc: The basis of flamecraft, which is controlling and fanning flames ever larger.

abilities.name: Wrathcraft

name: Novice Blazecraft
desc: You have an aptitude for controlling flames and can bend them to your will with a thought.

abilities.name: Blazecraft
Spreading Flames
abilities.effect:
Choose one:
* _Ignite_ a piece of _Flammable_ _Terrain_ within the Target.
* Choose _Blazing_ _Terrain_ within Range and make it _Roaring_.

enhancements.name: Sustaining Blaze
enhancements.effect: Instead, create a _Blazing_ piece of _Terrain_ within Range. This does not need _Flammable_ _Terrain_.

abilities.name: Ember
abilities.effect: Attack a Target within Range. On a _Miss_, _Ignite_ all _Terrain_ the Target is _Occupying_.

enhancements.name: Erupting Flame
enhancements.effect: Instead, resolve the Attack against all creatures in an _Engagement_ and _Ignite_ it.

enhancements.name: Hungry Flame
enhancements.effect: Inflict an additional 1 _Alight_ on a _Graze_+. Additionally, on a _Hit_+, if the target has any flammable equipment, you may choose to ignite it as well. The target treats their _Alight_ as 2 higher so long as they are _Wielding_ said equipment. They can remove the effect on the Equipment as if it was _Alight_.

name: Basic Watersense
desc: All with watercraft sense nearby water, like an innate dowsing rod.

abilities.name: Watersense

name: Basic Frostcraft
desc: The absolute basics of frostcraft, a part of watercraft that focuses on manipulating snow and ice.

abilities.name: Frostcraft

name: Novice Frostcraft
desc: More advanced applications of frostcraft, allowing you to manipulate and form ice into specific shapes.

abilities.name: Frostcraft
Chilly Disposition
abilities.effect: When traveling, your _Spirit_ may gain _Stress_ or you may spend 1 [-] to decrease the rank of a single _Affliction_ (making a _Fatigue_ a _Stress_, for example) caused by extreme heat for any character.

abilities.name: Icebending
abilities.effect: You have _Bend_ [_Ice_] within Range 1. Additionally, you may use _Brawl_ against all Targets made of _Ice_ or wearing _Ice_ Armor within that Range and paying all costs with _Essence_ instead of _Momentum_. If you choose the <u>Steal</u> option, you may instead Target any creature, but must Target a _Ice_ piece of _Equipment_. Finally, you may treat _Ice_ and _Water_ _Source_ 2 or less as equivalent.

abilities.name: Thaw
abilities.effect: Remove up to 5 _Frozen_; the creature then becomes _Wet_.

abilities.name: Frozen Sheet
abilities.effect: Replace a single _Engagement_ of _Wet_ _Terrain_ with _Icy_ _Terrain_.

enhancements.name: Shaped Ice
enhancements.effect: Additionally, add a _Tripping Hazard_ or _Spikes_ to the _Engagement_.

enhancements.name: Condensation
enhancements.effect: You may target an _Engagement_ that is not _Wet_.

enhancements.name: Thick Sheet
enhancements.effect: Instead, create _Terrain_ within a _Water_ _Arena_ where creatures do not have to be _Swimming_. It is still _Icy_.

abilities.name: Icicle Shot
abilities.effect: Remove a _Source_ 1 (_Water_) within Range, then attack a target within Range. After, leave a _Source_ 1 (_Ice_) within the target's _Arena_.

enhancements.name: Icicle Barrage
enhancements.effect: You may instead use a _Source_ 2 (_Water_) as the _Missile_. Deal +_1/1/2/2_ Damage if you do. After, leave three _Source_ 1 (_Ice_) within the target's _Arena_.

enhancements.name: Superchilled
enhancements.effect: On a _Graze_, add _Frozen_ 1. On a _Hit_+, add _Frozen_ 2.

name: Basic Tidecraft
desc: The basis of most watercraft, tidecraft relies on pushing, pulling, and otherwise manipulating water.

abilities.name: Tidecraft

name: Novice Tidecraft
desc: You have honed your ability to control water, pushing it and pulling it much like the tides do.

abilities.name: Tidecraft
Friendly Current
abilities.effect: Gain +1 to _Negate_ all effects that use _Water_ as the Material.

abilities.name: Splash
abilities.effect:
Choose one:
* Remove a _Source_ 1 (_Water_) within Range (including _Soaked_) then add _Wet_ within Range.
* If there is a _Source_ 2 (_Water_) or greater, add _Wet_ within Range.

enhancements.name: Friendly Splash
enhancements.effect: When you would add _Wet_ _Terrain_, instead grant an ally within Range _Soaked_.

enhancements.name: Unfriendly Splash
enhancements.effect: When you would add _Wet_ _Terrain_, instead inflict _Soaked_ on a creature within _Range_.

abilities.name: Violent Stream
abilities.effect: Remove a _Source_ 1 (_Water_) within Range, then attack a target within Range. If the Target does not become _Soaked_ their _Engagement_ becomes _Wet_.

enhancements.name: Wave Crash
enhancements.effect: Instead, remove a _Source_ 2 (_Water_) within Range. Resolve the Attack against all creatures in an _Engagement_, and make their _Engagement_ _Wet_.

enhancements.name: Driving Stream
enhancements.effect: Add _Push_ [_Grit_] to the Attack.

name: Basic Bloodcraft
desc: You have a modicum of control over blood, pulling upon the water within it.

abilities.name: Bloodcraft

name: Basic Serenecraft
desc: The emotional aspect of watercraft, which imposes the calm of a tranquil lake on others.

abilities.name: Serenecraft

name: Basic Ripplecraft
desc: By submerging an object you can get a vague sense of its past.

abilities.name: Ripplecraft

name: Basic Landcraft
desc: Basic manipulation of earth and soil that most earthbound have some competency with.

abilities.name: Landcraft

name: Basic Mightcraft
desc: You can draw strength from the earth, granting you enhanced capabilities while in solid contact with the ground.

abilities.name: Mightcraft

name: Novice Mightcraft
desc: You can draw strength from the earth, allowing you to push towards the limits of what the human body can accomplish with sheer strength.

abilities.name: Mightcraft
Mighty Back
abilities.effect: You may carry 1 _Load_ without it affecting your _Encumbrance_. If you spend the majority of the day traveling on something other than earth, lose this benefit.

abilities.name: Strength of the Earth
abilities.effect: Gain +1 _Grit_; if you spend the majority of the day traveling on something other than earth, lose this benefit. Additionally, while on solid earth, your [_Martial_] Attacks deal +1 _Stun_.

abilities.name: Draw Vitality
abilities.effect:
Choose one:
* Gain [_Discount_ 1] on the next [_Martial_] Attack you make this _Turn_.
* Add _Push_ to your next [_Martial_] Attack made this _Turn_.
* Immediately gain 3 _Guard_ or clear _Poisoned_ 1.

name: Basic Heartcraft
desc: You can rouse and harden hearts, giving those near a slightly greater sense of courage.

abilities.name: Heartcraft

name: Basic Tremorcraft
desc: You feel the quaking and vibrations of the earth even at a distance, allowing you to detect creatures from afar.

abilities.name: Tremorcraft

name: Basic Breezecraft
desc: You are able to use the wind as an extension of your own senses, feeling sensations from a much greater distance.

abilities.name: Breezecraft

name: Novice Breezecraft
desc: You make the air near you an extension of your own senses, providing you the ability to detect anything near you.

abilities.name: Breezecraft
On the Wind
abilities.effect: When _Menace_  or _Discovery_ is drawn, you may attempt to glean more info. Your spirit gains _Stress_, but you immediately learn its rank or additional information. You may spend [ ] to reveal this card.

abilities.name: Goosebumps
abilities.effect: When something surprising, unexpected, or dangerous would happen that could be felt through the air, your spirit may immediately gain _Stress_. You detected this with your breezecraft before it happened, and are able to act as if you were not surprised or otherwise caught off-guard.

abilities.name: Circle
abilities.effect: While in _Wind_ _Terrain_, gain +1 to all _Defend_ rolls.

imbues.name: Extended Senses
imbues.effect: Gain the effect even if you are not in _Wind_ _Terrain_.

imbues.name: Perfect Circle
imbues.effect: For the remainder of the _Round_, no attack originating from outside your _Arena_ may have _Advantage_ against you.

abilities.name: Brushing Breeze
abilities.effect: You extend your senses towards the Target; they must _Negate_ [7 _Focus_] or gain _Studied_. If they are in _Wind_ _Terrain_, they automatically fail to _Negate_.

name: Basic Stonecraft
desc: The absolute basics of stonecraft, which relies on manipulating stone at a distance.

abilities.name: Stonecraft

name: Novice Stonecraft
desc: The fundamentals of stonecraft, which forgoes shaping massive amounts of earth for finer control and manipulation of specific objects.

abilities.name: Stonecraft
Earthbending
abilities.effect: You have _Bend_ [_Earth_] within Range 1. Additionally, you may use _Brawl_ against all Targets made of _Earth_ or wearing _Earth_ Armor within that Range and paying all costs with _Essence_ instead of _Momentum_. If you choose the <u>Steal</u> option, you may instead Target any creature, but must Target an _Earth_ piece of _Equipment_.

abilities.name: Compact
abilities.effect:
Create one of the following, placing all unattended in your Arena:
*  Four fist-sized stones that count as _Source_ 0s.
*  Two larger stones count as _Source_ 1s.
*  A small boulder that count as a _Source_ 2.

abilities.name: Earthen Fling
abilities.missile: An Unattended _Source_ 0 (_Earth_) or one _Worn by you/an ally within Range.
abilities.effect: Choose a Missile, then Attack a target within Range with it. After resolving the Attack, place the Missile unattended in the Target's _Arena_.
abilities.special: If the _Missile_ has an Attack with _Slash_ or _Stab_ you may replace _Crush_ with said keyword.

enhancements.name: Heavy Stone
enhancements.effect: You may instead use a _Source_ 1 (_Earth_) as the _Missile_. Deal +_1/1/2/2_ Damage if you do.

enhancements.name: Heavier Stone
enhancements.effect: You may instead use a _Source_ 2 (_Earth_) as the _Missile_. If you do, this is instead a _Heavy_ Attack and deals +_1/2/4/4_ Damage, +_1/1/2/2_ _Stun_, add [_Siege_] and increase the DC to _Negate_ by 1.

name: Basic Metalsense
desc: All with metalcraft have an innate, intuitive grasp of where nearby metal is.

abilities.name: Metalsense

name: Basic Woodsense
desc: All with woodcraft have an innate, intuitive grasp of where nearby wood is.

abilities.name: Woodsense

name: Basic Windsense
desc: All with windcraft have a specific sense of how the air near them is moving.

abilities.name: Windsense

name: Basic Stormcraft
desc: Basic manipulation of electricty that few windbound are brave enough to specialize in.

abilities.name: Stormcraft

name: Basic Nimblecraft
desc: You can draw speed from the wind, granting you enhanced capabilities while air is freely flowing.

abilities.name: Nimblecraft

name: Basic Terrorcraft
desc: You can pull upon the primal fear of storms and wind, causing others to flinch back.

abilities.name: Heartcraft

name: Novice Stormcraft
desc: A more specialized focus of windcraft that, nonetheless, all practitioners of it have some basic skill with.

abilities.name: Stormcraft
Stormbending
abilities.effect: You have _Bend_ [_Lightning_] within Range 1. Additionally, you may use _Brawl_ against all Targets made of _Lightning_. If you choose the <u>Steal</u> option, you may instead Target any creature, but must Target a _Lightning_ piece of _Equipment_.

abilities.name: Storm Shield
abilities.effect: When traveling, your _Spirit_ may gain _Stress_ or you may spend 1 [-] to decrease the rank of a single _Affliction_ (turning _Fatigue_ to _Stress_, for example) caused by lightning strikes or other electricity-based effects  for any character.

abilities.name: Jolt
abilities.effect: Attack a Target within Range. If the Target is _Wearing_ _Metal_, is _Water_, or is _Soaked_, add [_Pierce_ 3].

enhancements.name: Arc Lighning
enhancements.effect: Make the Attack against another Target within Range, drawing it from the original target.

enhancements.name: Bolt
enhancements.effect: This Attack is instead _Balanced_. Deal +_2/4/4/5_ additional Damage, and increase the cost to _Negate_ by 1.

name: Basic Barkcraft
desc: The absolute basics of barkcraft, a speciality of woodcraft that focuses on moving, controlling, and enhancing wood.

abilities.name: Barkcraft

name: Novice Barkcraft
desc: You are more adept at barkcraft, and better able to make use of its finer points.

abilities.name: Barkcraft
Woodbending
abilities.effect: You have _Bend_ [_Wood_] within Range 1. Additionally, you may use _Brawl_ against all Targets made of _Wood_ or wearing _Wood_ Armor within that Range and paying all costs with _Essence_ instead of _Momentum_. If you choose the <u>Steal</u> option, you may instead Target any creature, but must Target a _Wood_ piece of _Equipment_.

abilities.name: Hardwood
abilities.effect: By channeling your craft you can temporarily enhance your wooden equipment.

imbues.name: Hardened Shield
imbues.effect: You gain +1 Block if you Block while Wielding [_Wood_] Equipment or Wearing [_Wood_] Armor.

abilities.name: Wooden Splinter
abilities.missile: An Unattended _Source_ 0 (_Wood_) item or one _Worn by you/an ally within Range.
abilities.effect: Choose a Missile, then Attack a target within Range with it. After resolving the Attack, place the Missile unattended in the Target's _Arena_. Use the most appropriate damage type, or _Stab_ if it is unclear.

enhancements.name: Wooden Spine
enhancements.effect: You may instead use a _Source_ 1 (_Wood_) item as the _Missile_. Deal +_1/1/2/2_ Damage if you do.

enhancements.name: Wooden Barrage
enhancements.effect: You may use X additional _Sources_ of the same size. For each additional _Source_ you use, gain a +1 to the _Attack Roll_ to the Attack.

name: Basic Adamantcraft
desc: The physical aspect of metalcraft, where you enhance your stamina and enhance your ability to ignore pain.

abilities.name: Adamantcraft

name: Basic Griefcraft
desc: You can impose the cold, unyielding emotionless of metal on others, although you lack technique.

abilities.name: Griefcraft

name: Basic Griefcraft
desc: You can impose the cold, unyielding emotionless of metal on others, although you lack technique.

abilities.name: Griefcraft

name: Basic Silvercraft
desc: Metal enhances your mental senses, improving memory and allowing you to think faster, although at this stage it is little more effective than a memory trick.

abilities.name: Silvercraft

name: Basic Lodecraft
desc: The absolute basics of metalcraft, which relies on manipulating metal at a distance.

abilities.name: Lodecraft

name: Novice Lodecraft
desc: You have some skill at controlling metal, and can accomplish basic manipulation feats.

abilities.name: Lodecraft
Metalbending
abilities.effect: You have _Bend_ [_Metal_] within Range 1. Additionally, you may use _Brawl_ against all Targets made of _Metal_ or wearing _Metal_ Armor within that Range and paying all costs with _Essence_ instead of _Momentum_. If you choose the <u>Steal</u> option, you may instead Target any creature, but must Target a _Metal_ piece of _Equipment_.

imbues.name: Projected Ward
imbues.effect: Increase your _Resistance_ to _Metal_ by 1 step for the remainder of the round.

abilities.name: Metal Shot
abilities.missile: An Unattended _Source_ 0 (_Metal_) item or one _Worn by you/an ally within Range.
abilities.effect: Choose a Missile, then Attack a target within Range with it. After resolving the Attack, place the Missile unattended in the Target's _Arena_. Use the most appropriate damage type, or _Crush_ if it is unclear.

enhancements.name: Power Shot
enhancements.effect: You may instead use a _Source_ 1 (_Metal_) item as the _Missile_. If you do, this is instead a _Balanced_ Attack and deals +_0/1/3/4_ Damage.

enhancements.name: Rail Shot
enhancements.effect: You may instead use a _Source_ 2 (_Metal_) item as the _Missile_. If you do, this is instead a _Heavy_ Attack and deals +_0/2/6/7_ Damage.

name: Basic Anvilcraft
desc: The ability to subtly change physical properties of metal, whether that be making them weaker or stronger.

abilities.name: Anvilcraft

name: Novice Anvilcraft
desc: The fundamentals of anvilcraft, a speciality of metalcraft that focuses on changing the structure of metal to strengthen, weaken, or alter the shape of it.

abilities.name: Anvilcraft
Fullmetal
abilities.effect:
Your equipment is sharper, harder, and otherwise more deadly than others'. Gain the following:
* Whenever your [_Metal_] _Equipment_ would lose _Durability_ (even in narrative play) roll a d6; on a 6, it instead doesn't. Your _Spirit_ may gain _Fatigue_ to treat a failed roll as a success.
* Your [_Metal_] Attacks gain [_Pierce_ 1].
* You gain +1 _Block_ if you _Block_ while _Wielding_ [_Metal_] Equipment or _Wearing_ [_Metal_] _Armor_.

imbues.name: Honed Edge
imbues.effect: In addition, deal +1 Damage with [_Metal_]  Attacks.

imbues.name: Hardened Hide
imbues.effect: In addition, gain +1 _Block_ if you're wearing [_Metal_] Armor, +1 more if you're wearing at least 4 _Slots_ of it.

abilities.name: Perfect Edge
abilities.effect: Add [_Pierce_] 2 and _Shatter_. Deal 1 _Stun_ to all other creatures you are _Engaged_ with if you _Shatter_ a piece of _Equipment_.

abilities.name: Shatter Spears
abilities.effect:
You have _Advantage_ to _Negate_ against _Shatter_ targeting _Metal_ Equipment this _Turn_ and gain +2 _Block_. If you lose no _Stamina_ from and are not _Shatter_ by the triggering Attack, choose one:
* _Shatter_ the weapon used for the Attack.
* Inflict _Exposed_/_Impaired_ [5 _Reflex_] on the Attacker if they are in _Melee_ Range.

name: Basic Galecraft
desc: Basic manipulation of air and wind that all windbound have some aptitude for.

abilities.name: Galecraft

name: Novice Galecraft
desc: The fundamentals of galecraft, the primary use of windcraft that simply creates and controls powerful bursts of wind.

abilities.name: Galecraft
Airbending
abilities.effect: You have _Bend_ [_Wind_] within Range 1. Additionally, you may use the <u>Fling</u> and <u>Toss</u> _Enhancements_ of _Drop_ as if you had _Bend_ within the same Range, so long as they are _Load_ 0 or less and end further from you than they started. Finally, you may use _Brawl_ against all Targets made of _Wind_ within that Range and paying all costs with _Essence_ instead of _Momentum_. If you choose the <u>Steal</u> option, you may instead Target any creature within your _Bend_ Range, but must Target a _Load_ 0 piece of _Equipment_ and place it unattended in the _Arena_.

abilities.name: Control Winds
abilities.effect: The _Arena_ gains or removes _Gusting_.

abilities.name: Gust
abilities.effect: Attack a target within Range. This Attack ignores any penalties due to _Gusting_ and instead gains a +1 to the _Attack Roll_ when targeting creatures in a _Gusting_ _Arena_.

enhancements.name: Forceful Gust
enhancements.effect: Instead inflict _Forceful Push_.

name: Basic Leechcraft
desc: The physical aspect of woodcraft involves transfering life force or stamina, although at this rank the effect is little more noticeable than a strong cup of tea.

abilities.name: Leechcraft

name: Basic Auracraft
desc: When applied to your senses, woodcraft can allow you to read the state of those near you, manifesting as a hazy aura.

abilities.name: Auracraft

name: Basic Joycraft
desc: Wood controls the emotion of joy, and can inspire it in others when properly applied.

abilities.name: Joycraft

name: Novice Joycraft
desc: After diligent training you have enhanced your joycraft, ensuring that you are always a pleasure to be around.

abilities.name: Joycraft
Joyweaving
abilities.effect: You can subtly weave joycraft into your conversations, slightly influencing others with a general sense of ease and sense of joy while around you. If in an extended conversation with somebody else you may choose yourself or something you talked about; until the end of your next _Downtime_ the target will regard it more favorably. Your _Matchmaker_ should mark this as a _Condition_ so it can be leveraged at a later date. When used in this way your craft is undetectable except by other craft.

abilities.name: Joyful Presence
abilities.effect: When you do not need to be sublte with your craft you can use it to lift the spirits of your allies. Choose an ally; they may roll a die. On a 5+, they clear _Stress_; if they fail the roll, your spirit may gain _Stress_ to instead allow them to succeed. Additionally, whenever you participate in the _Connect_ _Camp Action_, the other target gains a +1 to their roll to clear _Stress_.

abilities.name: Inspire Joy
abilities.target: An ally that is not _Anguished_ II or more.
abilities.effect: You may inspire a supernatural sense of joy in an ally. Inflict _Joyful_  on the target; this may not increase them beyond _Joyful_ I.

enhancements.name: Joyful Aura
enhancements.effect: Instead, resolve the effect on all allies in your _Arena_.

name: Basic Bloomcraft
desc: Often considered one of the most difficult types of craft, the basics of bloomcraft are little more than enough to help some grass along.

abilities.name: Bloomcraft

name: Novice Bloomcraft
desc: The fundamentals of bloomcraft, a speciality of woodcraft that focuses on manipulating living plant matter, causing it to bloom, grow, and change.

abilities.name: Bloomcraft
Ripen
abilities.effect: Whenever you find interesting plant life (such as from _Forage_) you may induce growth in nearby plants, forcing some that are near bloom to ripen. Your Spirit gains _Stress_, but you gain +1 _Supply_. You may use this even if there is no plant life; if you do, your spirit instead gains _Fatigue_.

abilities.name: Control Growth
abilities.target: An _Overgrown_ Arena or one that is a _Source_ (_Plant_).
abilities.effect:
Choose one:
* Create a _Tripping Hazard_ that is made of _Wood_.
* Remove a piece of _Wood_ _Terrain_ that is a _Source_ 1 or less.

enhancements.name: Wild Growth
enhancements.effect: Instead, the _Arena_ gains or removes _Overgrown_.

abilities.name: Ensnare
abilities.effect: The Target must _Negate_ [_Grit_/_Reflex_ 8] or gain _Entangled_ 1. If the Target is in an _Overgrown_ _Arena_, increase the _Negate_ DC by 2 or decrease the Cost by 1. _Fire_ Damage also causes the Target to clear _Entangled_ as if it was _Slash_ Damage.

enhancements.name: Massive Growth
enhancements.effect: 'Instead, the Target is 'All creatures in an _Overgrown_ _Arena_'.

name: Artist
desc: You are a skilled artist, allowing you to accurately capture imagery of the natural world and create aesthetic constructions.

abilities.name: Artistic Fundamentals
Artistic Analysis
abilities.effect: While you have a _Sketchbook_ you may, as a _Camp Action_, clear a _Stress_ then make an incredibly detailed sketch of something you saw today in your _Sketchbook_. The act of transferring this to your _Sketchbook_ gives you additional information about the target, typically the equivalent of the _Observation_ or _Advantage_ Augment, but may provide additional effects (such as additional _Mastery_ when sketching a significant landmark) at GM discretion.

abilities.name: Artistic Expression
abilities.effect:
During Downtime you may create a grand piece of art of your chosen medium that is too large to easily transport but a wonderful gift to your current location. Choose whether this is an object of Fear, Wonder, or Glory:
* If you choose Fear, you depict a danger you encountered on your adventures.
* If you choose Wonder, you depict something incredible you saw on your journey.
* If you choose Glory, you depict you our your allies accomplishing great things on your journey.

While in the location that has your artwork you have treat it as an Advantage on checks relating to what it depicts or when leaning into its thematic meaning.

name: Merchant
desc: When it comes to bartering and haggling you are the expert; while trade in the Shattered World is complex and unpredictable, you always seem to find the right path forward.

abilities.name: Mercantile
Supply and Demand
abilities.effect: Before starting a _Travel Leg_, your GM must tell you what the next town has an abundance of and what they have a shortage of. When trading these items, you may trade what they have a shortage of as if it was one Rarity higher, and what they have an abundance of one Rarity lower.

abilities.name: Skilled Haggler
abilities.effect: Whenever you encounter traders or enter a new town you may get _Supplies_ for free (2 if a town or larger) through a series of intricate trades. You may use this ability once per trader/town per _Journey_.

abilities.name: Secret Stash
abilities.effect: Once per _Journey_ you may rummage through your pack and find something you have tucked away. You may trade _Supplies_ for 2 _Load_ of _Common_ items, or 1 _Load_ of _Uncommon_. You may regain use of this ability by trading, or automatically as a part of _Downtime_.

abilities.name: Ledgers
abilities.effect: You are able to read and write, and are near-instant with any math you might have to do as a merchant. Gain 1 _Lore_.

name: Delver
desc: The Underworld is a dangerous place, full of archaic machines and deadly traps. Despite this, it's a world of riches, one which you've delved into time and time again.

abilities.name: Delving Expertise
Basic Literacy
abilities.effect: You are able to read and write. Gain 1 _Lore_.

abilities.name: Old World Knowledge
abilities.effect: You can read the Old Script and, while many of the details remain a mystery, you have a better grasp on the history of the Old World than others. You gain increased insights when you encounter ruins and other things from the Old World.

abilities.name: Mechanic
abilities.effect: You have an instinctive understanding of machines and devices from the Old World and, while you can't reproduce them, you can typically determine how to safely operate them and, if damaged, you know what you might need to do to get it in working order. This includes complex machinery, but you are also able to deal with simple devices such as locks given the appropriate tools.

abilities.name: Untrappable
abilities.effect: Whenever you encounter a trap, you always act with an _Advantage_ to disarm it and, when subjected to it, you may reduce the severity of an ill-effect by one, once per trap (making a _Wound_ a _Fatigue_, for example).

abilities.name: Underworld Trail
abilities.effect: Whenever a _Discovery_ is drawn, your GM must inform you if it is connected to the Underworld.

name: Herbalist
desc: You are well-studied when it comes to herbs, and can create many basic remedies from them even with limited supplies.

abilities.name: Herbalism
Gather Herbs
abilities.effect: When you <u>Forage</u> as a _Camp_ or _Travel_ _Action_ you always gain +1 _Herbalism Supplies_, and may replace any amount of _Supplies_ you would gain with _Herbalism Supplies_. Additionally, you know the _Uncommon_ and _Rare_ Herbs within the area, and may choose to gain 2 less _Supplies_ to gain a single _Uncommon_ Herb in the area, or 3 less to gain a _Rare_ one.

abilities.name: Field Herbalism
abilities.effect:
As a _Camp Action_ when you have _Herbalism Tools_ you may create something with herbs you have on hand. Choose one:
* _Refine_ an _Herb_ in your possession.
* Expend _Herbalism Supplies_, then gain any two of a _Poultice_ or _Antidote_, in any combination.
* Expend three _Herbalism Supplies_. Gain a _Health Flask_.

You may convert a single _Herbalism Supplies_ into a _Poultice_ or _Antidote_ without using a _Camp Action_; if you do, gain _Stress_.

abilities.name: Cultivation
abilities.effect: You may start a _Journey_ with any amount of _Herbalism Supplies_. Whenever you have downtime in a friendly location you may establish or cultivate a garden. Any Herbs you are carrying can be planted in the location. When you start a _Journey_ from a location with a garden you start with the refined version of herbs in the garden at no Cost, up to one per planted herb. You may instead choose to take the raw herbs themselves.

name: Farmer
desc: You've worked on a farm, making you used to hard physical labor and providing you a wide breadth of knowledge.

abilities.name: Farm Days
Hard Labor
abilities.effect: You may carry 2 more _Load_ in your _Pack_.

abilities.name: High-Quality Produce
abilities.effect: Twice per _Journey_, you may trade _Supplies_ for 2 _Good Meals_ as you enjoy food given to you in exchange for farm labor, which typically takes the form of fruit or vegetable preserves, cheeses, or incredibly high quality jerky. You may refresh one use of this ability by helping at a farm for or similar for a day; otherwise, regain all uses whenever you spend _Downtime_ somewhere with a farm or similar.

abilities.name: Animal Empathy
abilities.effect:
Your time working with livestock has given you an innate aptitude with animals; they tend to warm to you quickly, and you are better able to read their body language. When you interact with an animal, you may ask the GM one of the following questions and they will answer truthfully:
* What (if anything) is wrong with this animal?
* What is this animal's role in its pack or herd?
* What is this animal currently worried about?
* What can I do to make this animal like me?

 These effects are heightened when interacting with domesticated animals; in such situations, you may always roll _Skillfully_.

name: Hunter
desc: You are skilled at tracking game, and can easily supply food for your party while hunting.

abilities.name: Hunter
Skilled Hunter
abilities.effect: Whenever you <u>Hunt</u> as a _Camp_ or _Travel_ _Action_ treat yourself as having placed an additional die on the _Advantage_. You may always look at your current area's _Hunting Chart_ before deciding to roll on it, although the GM may hide the specifics of the rarest option on the table. If your roll would get you nothing, instead gain 1 _Basic Meal_.

abilities.name: Tracker
abilities.effect: When traveling, you may spend one [ ] for any tracking related _Augment_ or to remove _Indiscretion_. Additionally, once per day when _Menace_ or _Discovery_ is drawn, you may attempt to glean more info. If your ability to track would aid in detecting this, immediately learn its rank or additional information. You may spend [ ] to reveal this card. If your ability to track is not relevant, do not expend your use of this ability.

abilities.name: Prepared Game
abilities.effect: During downtime, you can stock up on food before the journey. Once per _Journey_ you may spend _Supplies_ to gain 2 _Good Meals_.

name: Scholar
desc: You are studious and well-read, a rare trait in the Shattered World.

abilities.name: Scholar
Living Library
abilities.effect: You are able to read and write at a high level. Gain 4 _Lore_.

abilities.name: Walking Library
abilities.effect: You have a small collection of books at home. When you leave for a _Journey_ you may bring up to 3 _Load_ of books relevant to your current travels. Once per _Journey_ per _Load_, you may, as a _Camp Action_, read the books you have packed. Regain 1 _Lore_ and clear a _Stress_. You may not use this if you are at your maximum _Lore_. When at an appropriate location you can typically trade your books for new relevant ones, refreshing the uses of this ability. Leaving the books behind in an unsafe location will cause you to take 2 _Stress_.

name: Keeper
desc: You are one of your town's keepers, one who is in charge of remembering the tales of those that came before and ensuring they do not fade from memory.

abilities.name: Keeper Training
Spiritual Insights
abilities.effect: As a keeper, the tales you learn are partially to honor those that came before and partially to ensure the remnant spirits within your town continue to have a tie to it. Due to this, you are adept at assessing spirits, and can easily determine their approximate power level, even if they are attempting to hide it. If they are a remnant, you can approximate how much longer they have before fully fading away.

abilities.name: Memento Mori
abilities.effect: The remnant spirits within your town treat you in a friendly manner and are inclined to assist you whenever possible. While in your hometown you may gain an _Advantage_ on a _Skill Challenge_ as you call upon a remnant spirit. This power may extend to other towns if you are able to learn a sufficient amount of their history to know the tales of the companions of other remnant spirits.

abilities.name: Calligraphy
abilities.effect: You are able to read and write, and specifically have beautiful, easy-to-read handwriting. Gain 1 _Lore_.

abilities.name: Campfire Tales
abilities.effect: At the start of each _Journey_, gain 6 Story Points. As a _Camp Action_, you can tell a tale from your repertoire, choosing one to help your party relax. Spend any number of of your story points; all your human companions may roll a d6 and add the number of Story Points you spent. If they get a 6 or higher, they may clear a _Stress_.

name: Wanderer
desc: You are an experienced traveler, with a breadth of knowledge of how the roads work and unparalleled traveling endurance.

abilities.name: Roadwise
Adept Traveler
abilities.effect: Roll +1 die when making your _Travel Roll_. You may choose a different _Approach_ from the rest of the party, and may gain _Stress_ to roll _Skillfully_.

name: Ranger
desc: You are an expert in the wilderness, allowing you to easily maneuver across the landscape while finding the time to resupply.

abilities.name: Wilderness Survival
Survival Instinct
abilities.effect: The first time you pull from the _Menace Deck_ you may choose to exclude _Mishaps_ put there due to party members. Additionally, while traveling, you may spend one [ ] to offset the _Menace_ Danger. If you do, roll a d6; on a 3 or higher, gain _Stress_, otherwise gain _Fatigue_.

abilities.name: Multitasking
abilities.effect: While traveling, you may select any number of jobs when you play the _Efficacy_ Advantage. Additionally, you may choose a different _Approach_ than the rest of your party and, when you play _Indiscretion_, you may remove it from any two characters in the party.

abilities.name: Hide All Traces
abilities.effect: You may, without spending a _Camp Action_, add _Hidden_ to your _Camp_. If you do, roll a d6; on a 3-, take a _Stress_.

name: Blacksmith
desc: You are skilled at working with metal and, given a forge and time, can create a variety of tools and arms.

abilities.name: Strength of the Forge
Metallurgy
Metalworking
abilities.effect: When you _Mend_ while _Resting_ and target _Metal_ _Equipment_ you can either clear a _Stress_ as a part of the _Mend_ _Camp Action_ or use it on two different _Metal_ items. Additionally, as a _Camp Action_, you may choose a _Destroyed_ piece of _Metal_ _Equipment_. Spend 1 _Supplies_, then restore it to 1 _Durability_. This Action requires appropriate tools.

abilities.name: Forge-Trained
abilities.effect: Given appropriate tools and materials, you may craft Metal equipment. Most basic or rough tools can be crafted in a few hours, with more intricate or complicated tools taking longer.[Item crafting with extra benefits for metal]

name: Weaponsmith
desc: You specialize in crafting weapons of war, and few are your equal when crafting them.

abilities.name: Weapon Academia
Hone
abilities.effect: As a _Camp Action_, choose an ally (including yourself) without a _Weaponsmith's Blessing_. You may take the time to maintain that ally's weaponry, granting them a _Weaponsmith's Blessing_.

abilities.name: Weapon Maintenance
abilities.effect: Once per _Camp Phase_ you may take the _Mend_ or _Hone_ _Camp Action_ without expending your _Camp Action_ for the day. If you do, you may only target Weapons and gain _Stress_. Additionally, whenever you use _Mend_ a _Weapon_, roll a d6; on a 5+, you do not need to spend _Supplies_.

abilities.name: Forge Weapon
abilities.effect:
Given appropriate tools and materials, you may craft Weapons. All but the most crude of weapons take some time to craft. [Item crafting with extra benefits for weapons]

Additionally, at the start of a _Journey_, grant yourself and all allies a _Weaponsmith's Blessing_.

name: Tough
desc: You are exceptionally tough, pushing through any difficulty with determination and grit.

abilities.name: Exceptional Toughness
Toughened Hide
abilities.effect: When traveling in harsh conditions you may remove a single _Affliction_ or _Fatigue_ Hazard related to those conditions. You are naturally resilient and can power through rain, sleet, and heat.

abilities.name: Grin and Bear It
abilities.effect: Gain an additional segment on your _Health Bar_.

abilities.name: Toughness
abilities.effect: Gain +1 _Grit_ and +2 Stamina. At _Respite_, lose half the _Guard_ you would normally lose from Afflictions.

abilities.name: True Grit
abilities.effect: The triggering effect cannot reduce you below 1 _Stamina_. Automatically succeed any roll to _Negate_ with _Grit_/_Focus_ on the triggering Attack.

name: Clever
desc: You have a keen mind, and can often think your way out of a problem that would ensnare other.

abilities.name: Exceptional Mind
Boon of Cleverness
abilities.effect: When using your keen mind you may spend one [ ] as if it were [-] or for the _Advantage_ Augment, if appropriate.

abilities.name: All According to Plan
abilities.effect: You are constantly creating plans and contingencies, which sometimes come into play. Whenever you have a bonus die related to preparation, you may roll _Skillfully_.

abilities.name: Always Prepared
abilities.effect: When faced with a _Skill Challenge_ you may declare that you'd planned for this contingency. Take a _Stress_, then describe your preparations. Gain an additional die as if you had prepared.

abilities.name: Exceptional Plot
abilities.effect:
At _Respite_, inflict _Studied_ on a creature within Range 2, then choose one of the following plans:
* **Focus Fire!**: Choose a creature. Every time you or an ally would remove _Studied_ from the target creature, roll a d6. On a 3+, do not remove _Studied_.
* **Form Up!**: This _Round_ whenever an ally becomes _Engaged_ with another ally, both gain 2 _Guard_, up to once per _Turn_ per pair of allies.
* **Scatter!**: At the start of _Phase_ 1 you and all allies may spend up to 2 _Movement_ as if it was your _Turn_.

abilities.name: Exploit Opening
abilities.effect: Remove _Studied_ from the Target. They must immediately _Negate_ [_Focus_ 10]. Regardless of the result, they create an _Opening_. If they fail the _Negate_, add [_Pierce_ 2] to all resulting Attacks. If they succeed, they gain 2 _Block_ against all resulting Attacks.

name: Observant
desc: You are adept at reading people, and can pick up on small changes in a character's demeanor.

abilities.name: Exceptional Observation
Social Observation
abilities.effect:
When interacting with people, you may tap into your observational powers to gain additional insight. Ask one of the following questions, which the GM must answer honestly:
* What is the general emotional state of the room?
* Is this person lying or attempting to deceive us?
* What does this person want right now?

You may use this Ability once per day for free; gain _Stress_ for each successive use.

abilities.name: Unlicensed Therapist
abilities.effect: Once per day when a _Menace_ Card is revealed, you may attempt to glean more info. If the card is related to conflict or inter-party turmoil, immediately learn its rank. You may spend one [ ] as if it was [-] to remove this _Menace_ or, if it is a _Minor Mishap_, may take a _Stress_ to remove it.

abilities.name: Sense Intent
abilities.effect: At _Respite_ choose any enemy. The GM must tell you what category their selected _Stance_ is. If it is not an _Offensive_ _Stance_, inflict _Studied_. If it is an _Offensive_ _Stance_, instead learn how the enemy will select its Target.

abilities.name: Uncanny Observation
abilities.effect: The Target becomes _Studied_. If a character uses a _Social_ effect against them, they may remove _Studied_ to cause them to automatically fail the _Negate_ roll instead of the usual _Studied_ effect.

name: Charming
desc: You have an easy smile and an innate charm, making others feel at ease in your presence.

abilities.name: Exceptional Charm
Boon of Charm
abilities.effect: When using your natural charm you may spend one [ ] as [-] or the _Incitement_ Augment, if appropriate.

abilities.name: First Impression
abilities.effect: When meeting a new character you may charm them, causing them to treat you in a more friendly fashion. For example, a stranger might treat you as a friend, or a hostile creature may act more neutrally. If you attempt a _Skill Challenge_ against this character in the same _Scene_, you may roll _Skillfully_.
abilities.special: You may take 1 _Stress_ to regain your use of this _Ability_.

abilities.name: Fast Friends
abilities.effect: You start each _Journey_ with a _Bond_ with each of your allies.

abilities.name: Charming Presence
abilities.effect: At _Respite_ either target two allies with _Encourage_ [_Discount_ 1] or a single ally [_Discount_ 2].

abilities.name: Charm Offensive
abilities.effect: Deal 1 _Stun_ to the Target, then they must Negate [9 _Focus_]. On a failure, they have _Disadvantage_ to attack you until you make a hostile action against them, or they become afflicted with a similar effect. If they fail by 3 or more, deal an additional 2 _Stun_.

name: Strong
desc: You possess incredible physical strength, allowing you to accomplish feats that others could not even dream of.

abilities.name: Exceptional Strength
Boon of Strength
abilities.effect: When using your tremendous strength you may spend one [ ] as [-] or the _Efficacy_ Augment, if appropriate.

abilities.name: Overwhelming Power
abilities.effect: When rolling _Boldly_ and using your strength you may use this Ability to roll an additional 2 die, but automatically add the _Mayhem_ _Danger_. You may use this Ability once per day for free; take a _Fatigue_ for each successive use.

abilities.name: Strong Back
abilities.effect: You may carry 2 _Load_ without it affecting your _Encumbrance_.

abilities.name: Mighty
abilities.effect: Gain +2 _Grit_. You may, when it would be beneficial, treat yourself as Size 3 instead of Size 2. Additionally, you may use the <u>Strong Swing</u> _Enhancement_ with any [_Martial_] Attack.

enhancements.name: Strong Swing
enhancements.effect:
Choose one, or pay an additional _Momentum_ to choose 2:
	* Inflict additional _Stun_ equal to 1 + (the _Cost_ of the triggering Attack), even on a _Miss_.
	* The Target must _Negate_ _Grit_ with _Disadvantage_ this _Turn_. Add _Push_ [_Grit_] to the Attack or, if it already inflicted _Forced Movement_, add _Forceful_.

name: Swift
desc: You are fleet of foot and incredibly nimble, allowing you to outrun your peers with ease.

abilities.name: Fleet of Foot
Quick March
abilities.effect: During a _Travel Roll_, you may spend one [ ] as _Speed_. You may gain _Fatigue_ to instead allow an ally to spend one of their [ ] as _Speed_ as you help them compensate for their pace.

abilities.name: Incredible Speed
abilities.effect: Gain +1 _Movement_ and _Reflex_. You have _Advantage_ the first time you _Negate_ with _Reflex_ each _Phase_.

abilities.name: Swiftest
abilities.trigger: The _Phase_ before the one you are supposed to take your _Turn_ in begins.
abilities.effect: Instead, take your turn in this _Phase_.

abilities.name: Agility
abilities.effect: Ignore any increased _Movement_ costs due to _Terrain_ for a single _Move_ this _Turn_.
